% check a.php
a.php:4:13: cannot assign 'void' to $x
a.php:11:13: class member `Mysql::notExist` does not exist
a.php:13:18: class `Instance` not found

-- a.php --
<?php

$repo = new Repo;
$x = $repo->get();

$x->foo;
$x->bar;
$x->name;
$x->baz;

$x = $repo->notExist->doesNotExistEither();

$repo->instance->conn->getID();
-- d.php --
<?php

class Repo extends Mysql
{
	public function get()
	{
	}
}
-- m.php --

 * @property Instance $instance

{
